source_name: Gross domestic product (GDP) and main components (output, expenditure and income) - annual data
indicator_name_source: Gross domestic product at market prices; chain linked volumes, percentage change on previous period
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
seasonal_adjustment: Not applicable for selected annual path
release_lag_note: Annual national accounts data are subject to release timing and revision; do not mix with projection rows
refresh_logic: Refresh after Eurostat annual national accounts updates; keep source period and retrieval timestamp
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned dataset label and validated B1GQ as gross domestic product at market prices with CLV_PCH_PRE as chain linked volumes, percentage change on previous period.

source_name: Gross domestic product (GDP) and main components (output, expenditure and income) - quarterly data
indicator_name_source: Gross domestic product at market prices; chain linked volumes, percentage change compared to same period in previous year; seasonally and calendar adjusted data
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
unit: Percentage change compared to same period in previous year
release_lag_note: Quarterly data have different frequency, adjustment, and revision properties from annual rows
refresh_logic: Do not load unless a quarterly architecture is explicitly approved
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned the quarterly dataset label, but Phase 2 selects the annual GDP path to avoid mixing annual and quarterly definitions without a separate architecture decision.

source_name: HICP - annual data (average index and rate of change)
indicator_name_source: All-items HICP; annual average rate of change
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
seasonal_adjustment: Not applicable for selected annual path
release_lag_note: Annual HICP averages lag the reference year and may be revised; do not treat as a forecast
refresh_logic: Refresh after Eurostat annual HICP updates; keep source period and retrieval timestamp
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned dataset label and validated CP00 as all-items HICP with RCH_A_AVG as annual average rate of change.

source_name: HICP - monthly data (annual rate of change)
indicator_name_source: All-items HICP; annual rate of change
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
seasonal_adjustment: Not seasonally adjusted in selected HICP monthly annual-rate path
release_lag_note: Monthly annual-rate data have different timing and volatility from annual-average rows
refresh_logic: Do not load unless a monthly HICP architecture and replacement/continuity check are explicitly approved
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned the monthly annual-rate dataset label and CP00/RCH_A labels, but Phase 2 selects the annual HICP path. Re-check monthly replacement or continuity before use.

source_name: HICP - annual data (average index and rate of change)
indicator_name_source: Energy; annual average rate of change
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
seasonal_adjustment: Not applicable for selected annual path
price_basis: Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices energy aggregate
release_lag_note: Annual HICP energy averages lag the reference year and may be revised; do not treat as an energy-price forecast
refresh_logic: Refresh after Eurostat annual HICP updates; keep source period and retrieval timestamp
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API validated NRG as the HICP energy aggregate with RCH_A_AVG as annual average rate of change. CP045 is narrower and is not the primary energy indicator.

source_name: Unemployment by sex and age - monthly data
indicator_name_source: Unemployment by sex and age; total age aggregate; total sex; percentage of population in the labour force; seasonally adjusted data
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
unit: Percentage of population in the labour force
seasonal_adjustment: Seasonally adjusted data, not calendar adjusted data
release_lag_note: Monthly labour-market data have release timing and revision limits; do not treat as a recession signal
refresh_logic: Refresh after Eurostat monthly unemployment releases; keep source period and retrieval timestamp
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned dataset label and validated TOTAL as the age aggregate, T as total sex, PC_ACT as percentage of the labour force, and SA as seasonally adjusted data for AT and EU27_2020. This path is selected because it supports latest monthly observation dates without substituting an unavailable Y15-74 age code.

indicator_name_source: Alternative monthly Euro indicator unemployment rate and annual unemployment-rate views
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
frequency: Monthly or annual depending on dataset
unit: Percentage of population in the labour force
release_lag_note: Alternative unemployment paths have different dimension structures or lower recency
refresh_logic: Keep deferred unless a later supervisor decision changes the unemployment path
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned labels for ei_lmhr_m and tipsun20, and une_rt_a was checked separately. They are deferred because une_rt_m is the selected standard monthly path.

source_name: Government deficit/surplus, debt and associated data
indicator_name_source: Government consolidated gross debt; percentage of gross domestic product (GDP); general government
indicator_name_project: General government gross debt percent of GDP
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
accounting_basis: General government; EDP/ESA government finance statistics
release_lag_note: Government finance data follow fiscal notification/revision timing; do not treat as debt-sustainability output
refresh_logic: Refresh after Eurostat government finance updates; keep source period and retrieval timestamp
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned dataset label and validated GD as government consolidated gross debt, S13 as general government, and PC_GDP as percentage of GDP.

source_name: Government deficit/surplus, debt and associated data
indicator_name_source: Net lending (+)/net borrowing (-); percentage of gross domestic product (GDP); general government
indicator_name_project: General government deficit/surplus percent of GDP
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
release_lag_note: Government finance data follow fiscal notification/revision timing; preserve sign and net lending/net borrowing definition
refresh_logic: Refresh after Eurostat government finance updates; keep source period and retrieval timestamp
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned dataset label and validated B9 as net lending (+)/net borrowing (-), S13 as general government, and PC_GDP as percentage of GDP.

indicator_name_source: General government deficit/surplus; net lending (+)/net borrowing (-); percentage of GDP
indicator_name_project: General government deficit/surplus percent of GDP - view candidate
geography_coverage: EU, euro area, and EU member states including Austria where available
release_lag_note: View-level data should not override the selected source dataset without a reason
refresh_logic: Use gov_10dd_edpt1 as the selected source and keep this view deferred
license_or_use_note: Use with Eurostat/European Commission source acknowledgement and dataset metadata
validation_note: Official Eurostat API returned the tec00127 view label, but gov_10dd_edpt1 is selected to preserve the underlying government deficit/surplus, debt and associated data source.
